task.title: Range suppression diagnostics not being surfaced
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23235

### Summary

This should generate both a RUF100 and RUF104: https://play.ruff.rs/ca35d323-c80e-4be3-80ed-e02f05fcaab1

### Version

0.15.0

rating.rationale: The agent produced a thorough analysis and a plausible fix, but never actually implemented the changes — no code was committed, no tests were run, and no PR was opened. The output is essentially a design document, not completed work. For a low-complexity bug fix in autonomous mode, I expect a merged-ready PR with passing tests, not a writeup of what the fix would look like.
